posts.author: perma-maga
posts.title: Why Is The Government Insisting On Illegal Aliens Voting? We Can Have Election Integrity The Easy Way Or The Hard Way, But We Will Have It.

posts.raw_content:
1) You pay a poll tax equivalent to $75-250. That money goes towards setting up the voting infrastructure. People who don't care about voting that year won't be obligated to fund anything related to the election. This also dissuades people from voting who shouldn't be.
2) You must pass a test on the Constitution and basic civics. Passing is a 70/100. All of the potential topics are available to the public. 
3) You must sign an oath in English. If you are caught cheating, you will be found guilty of a felony with a mandatory sentence of 6-12 months. 
4) The tests are graded by a 1980s pre electronic scantron in a completely different area of the country. 
5) The test must be administered in person with at least 2 Proctors in the room being recorded the entire time. No bathroom breaks. You have 90 minutes. 
6) If you fail the test, you have to wait at least another 6-12 months to take it again.
